q1.question: Who can use the coworking?
q1.answer: Only members. Coworking plan membership is reserved for association members. To join you must submit a membership application (20€/year fee). When admitted (within 24 hours), you can pay the coworking contribution by bank transfer (instructions in the admission email).

q2.question: How much does coworking cost?
q2.answer: The contribution to use the coworking space is 120€/month. Places are limited (maximum 12). To reserve a month you must pay the contribution at least 15 days before the first day of that month.

q3.question: How do I become a member?
q3.answer: By submitting a membership application (20€/year fee). You receive a response within 24 hours; if admitted, the bank transfer instructions for the coworking contribution are sent by email.

q4.question: How do I pay the coworking contribution?
q4.answer: By bank transfer. Instructions are sent in the membership admission email. To reserve a month the contribution must be paid at least 15 days before the first day of that month.

q5.question: Can I contribute even if the coworking isn't open yet?
q5.answer: Yes. Contributing before we open helps us cover initial costs (finding the space, setup, equipment) and get the project off the ground. You can become a member (20€/year fee) and, if you wish, pay the coworking contribution in advance to reserve your spot as soon as we open.

q6.question: Can I become a member without contributing to coworking costs?
q6.answer: Absolutely. Coworking is just one of our activities: the association also promotes live music, festivals and cultural exchange. You can be a member by paying only the annual fee (20€/year) and take part in events, the community and initiatives without using the coworking space.

about.title: The association
about.description: ARTCORE is a Social Promotion Association (Associazione di Promozione Sociale) promoting coworking, live music, festivals and cultural exchange. A place where creativity and work meet.

journey.imageAlt: The coworking journey and shared space

project.title: The coworking journey
project.paragraph1: Coworking is for building the community and funding the association's spaces and activities. Together we're shaping a venue for coworking and small events (home concerts, book presentations, networking).
project.paragraph2: Coworking is for members only: the contribution is 120€/month and places are limited. To join you must become a member by submitting an application (20€/year fee); admission within 24 hours, then the coworking contribution is paid by bank transfer (instructions in the admission email).
project.paragraph3: There is no profit — only the desire that whoever uses these spaces, whether local or just passing through, finds a richer and more relevant cultural offering.

hero.title: About us
hero.subtitle: An APS for coworking, music and culture

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: We promote coworking spaces, live music, festivals and international cultural exchange. We believe in inclusive communities where art, work and connection merge.

hero.title: Coworking
hero.subtitle: Shared workspaces for creatives and professionals

hero.title: The space
hero.subtitle: Coworking by day, events and concerts in the evening

theSpace.intro: One space: workstations in the morning and afternoon, a room for events, home concerts and meetups in the evening.

morning.title: Morning and daytime
morning.body: Quiet workstations: desks, Wi‑fi, space for calls and meetings. A shared environment for remote workers and anyone who needs a base.

day.title: During the day
day.body: Coworking with shared desks, informal encounters, shared breaks. Suited to freelancers, startups and anyone looking for a place to work outside the office.

evening.title: Evening
evening.body: The space hosts events: home concerts, book launches, networking aperitifs. Same room, different use — work by day, culture and meetups in the evening.

night.title: After events
night.body: At the end of the evening the space closes. The next day it reopens for coworking. One place, two roles: work and community.

theSpace.outro: We're looking for the right venue and funding to open (estimated opening: early May). If you want to be part of it, become a member or get in touch.
theSpace.membershipIntro: Coworking is reserved for association members. The contribution to use it is 120€/month; places are limited (maximum 12). To join, submit a membership application (20€/year fee): you receive a response within 24 hours and, if admitted, the bank transfer instructions for the coworking contribution. To reserve a month you must pay the contribution at least 15 days before the first day of that month.

modal.title: Cookie preferences
modal.necessaryDesc: Essential for the site to work. Cannot be disabled.
modal.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the site.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how ARTCORE HUB uses cookies.
cookiePolicy.whatDesc: Cookies are small text files saved on your device when you visit the site.
cookiePolicy.analytics: Analytics cookies: for statistics and site improvement.
cookiePolicy.marketing: Marketing cookies: for advertising and personalized content.
cookiePolicy.functional: Functional cookies: for preferences and features.
cookiePolicy.manage: You can manage preferences via the cookie banner.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
gdpr.intro: Information on the processing of personal data under GDPR.
gdpr.controllerDesc: ARTCORE HUB is the data controller for data collected through this site.
gdpr.dataDesc: We only collect necessary data (name, email, message) when you contact us.
gdpr.purposeDesc: Data is used to respond to requests and for association communications.
gdpr.rightsDesc: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure and data portability. Contact us to exercise them.
